description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a mature deer, featuring a robust brown body with a lighter, almost beige chest and neck area. Its most striking feature is a large, intricate set of antlers that curve outward and upward, displaying multiple tines. The deer stands on four slender legs ending in dark, cloven hooves, and its tail is short and subtly pointed. The head is elongated with a dark snout, expressive eyes, and pointed ears that stand alert. The overall surface appears smooth with a matte finish, and the coloration transitions naturally from darker tones on the back and legs to lighter hues on the underbelly and neck.
description: A realistic brown deer with large, branching antlers, a light chest, pointed ears, and a short tail, standing on slender legs with dark hooves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical antlers, pointed ears, and the lighter chest and neck area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the body, the curvature of the antlers, and the short tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad back, short tail, and the symmetry of the antlers from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the body profile, antler structure, and the positioning of the legs and tail.
